steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The key signal is that the TJBH's deep water (below 400 meters) shows “density and salinity conditions akin to those of the nearby Caribbean Sea.” This similarity is the observation that prompts their inference.

steps.title: Match the meaning to the choices
steps.content:
A explains the similarity through an underground pathway: tunnels connecting the TJBH to Caribbean waters would account for how those water characteristics reached such depths.

The other choices either propose a comparison of variation rates not supported by the passage, suggest reevaluating other holes without justification, or contradict the similarity with an inverse relationship.

That matches choice A — A is correct.
